description: Self-generated Draw.io diagram generation tasks for evolving the drawio-diagram skill with SkillOpt.
scoring: Deterministic XML validation: well-formedness + mxfile/mxGraphModel/root structure + vertex/edge counts + required labels + (optional) dashed residual edge. hard = all checks pass; soft = fraction of checks passed.
notes: These tasks are intentionally small (10 items total) — SkillOpt needs only a handful of scored rollouts per minibatch to drive skill edits.
The seed skill is the existing skills/drawio-diagram/SKILL.md document.
